profile.name: 宋柏慧
profile.titleZh: AI 应用开发 / 客户端负责人
profile.summaryZh: 面向 Agent 工程岗位，具备从需求拆解、执行链设计到上线交付的完整实践，重点关注 Prompt 优化与通用 LLM Skill 封装。
profile.summaryEn: Targeted for Agent engineering roles with end-to-end delivery from requirement breakdown to workflow design and launch, focused on prompt optimization and reusable LLM skill packaging.

highlightsZh: 负责 AI 游戏研发与工程体系搭建，推动 OpenClaw/CodeX 在开发流程中的实践。
落地 HybridCLR + YooAsset + UI 框架 + Luban 的可迭代架构。
highlightsEn: Led AI game engineering delivery and workflow integration with OpenClaw/CodeX.
Built a scalable architecture with HybridCLR, YooAsset, UI framework, and Luban.

highlightsZh: 负责核心玩法与客户端架构，完成多平台上线与性能优化。
沉淀从开发、联调、打包到发布的标准流程。
highlightsEn: Developed core gameplay and client architecture with multi-platform delivery.
Standardized full pipeline from development and QA to packaging and release.

projects.name: AI 游戏 Demo（Unity）
projects.descriptionZh: 独立完成 AI 游戏 Demo 设计与开发，约 99% 代码由 AI 协作生成并人工优化验证。
projects.descriptionEn: Built a Unity AI game demo with AI-assisted coding and human quality refinement.

projects.name: 微信 / 抖音小游戏工程化交付
projects.descriptionZh: 从 0 到 1 完成小游戏技术方案、平台接入、发布流程和性能优化。
projects.descriptionEn: Delivered mini-game projects end-to-end including platform integration and performance optimization.

projects.name: OpenClaw + CodeX 开发流水线实践
projects.descriptionZh: 将 OpenClaw 与 CodeX 引入日常研发流程，覆盖需求拆解、代码实现、问题修复与迭代提效。
projects.descriptionEn: Integrated OpenClaw and CodeX into daily engineering workflow for delivery acceleration.

projects.name: 安卓视觉识别辅助工具
projects.descriptionZh: 基于 Android 与 OpenCV 的实用工具开发，验证图像识别在业务场景中的可用性。
projects.descriptionEn: Built an Android + OpenCV utility to validate practical computer vision scenarios.
